title: Cooldown for Totem of Undying
description: Adds cooldown to Totem of Undying usage
body:
### Cooldown for Totem of Undying
The mod imposes a cooldown on the use of **Totem  of Undying**. I think this mod will go to servers with a bias in PVP. 

#### Note
- Cooldown works just like ender perl.
- Cooldown = 60 second.
- Supported versions minecraft: >=1.16.x

#### Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api "Fabric API") - Required - The Fabric API is used by this mod for networking and event handling reasons.
